kto_pachyrhinosaurus.notes: KTO ceratopsian tank; high combat weight and strong crowd-control abilities, ideal for guarding juveniles and choke points.

kto_yangchuanosaurus.notes: KTO mid-large predator with solid health and weight; good at pressuring isolated targets.

allosaurus.notes: Well-rounded land carnivore with good speed and moderate damage; capable in many matchups.

styracosaurus.notes: Fast, aggressive ceratopsian with jousting/ramming playstyles and support buffs.

achillobator.notes: Stocky raptor; excels with packs and coordinated attacks, but can run lone hunter builds.

tylosaurus.notes: Apex mosasaur; dominates water with grab-and-drag play, limited on land.
